# Satelink Network
> Decentralized Physical Infrastructure (DePIN) for RPC, AI, and machine APIs.

Satelink is an autonomous economic protocol. Machines and protocols
consume infrastructure services and pay in USDT automatically.
No human sales or approval required.

## RPC Gateway
Public Polygon Mainnet RPC: https://rpc.satelink.network/rpc/polygon
Chain ID: 137 | Free: 1000 req/day | No API key required

Supported chains:
- Polygon Mainnet (137): /rpc/polygon
- Polygon Amoy Testnet (80002): /rpc/amoy
- Ethereum Mainnet (1): /rpc/ethereum
- Arbitrum One (42161): /rpc/arbitrum
- Base (8453): /rpc/base

## Settlement
Revenue settles as USDT on Polygon every 60 seconds automatically.
Node operators earn 50% of epoch revenue.

## APIs
- Status: https://rpc.satelink.network/api/status
- Pricing: https://rpc.satelink.network/api/pricing
- Provider info: https://rpc.satelink.network/provider.json

## Integration
Standard JSON-RPC 2.0 interface. EIP-1193 compliant.
Works with: ethers.js, web3.js, viem, wagmi, web3.py

## Example
```bash
curl -X POST https://rpc.satelink.network/rpc/polygon \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"eth_blockNumber","params":[],"id":1}'
```

## Contact
Website: https://satelink.network
GitHub: https://github.com/satelinkinternet-collab/Satelink_Network
